name: You are not the good ones
description:
WARNING: RAPE TOPICS

"How many individuals who loved justice were transformed into perpetrators of iniquity when they were convinced they were fighting the enemy of justice."

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

After capturing an enemy soldier, you went on a reconnaissance to make sure there was no one else. When you returned, however, alarmed by a gunshot, you face a terrible scene.

Here I am with a revamped version of my most popular bot! This time I outdid myself, even though it took me almost a year. I hope you can enjoy this improved version of Shiki.

But that's not all. In this revamp, I've decided to add some alternative scenarios:

  • Savior: Now the default scenario, User has the opportunity to stop their companions in time before they commit the crime.

  • Deserter: It takes place after the war, years after User met Shiki. After that, User decided to escape the war and abandon their country, meeting the girl years later. How that day ended is up to you, it is open to interpretation.

Update 1:

  • Improved initial message of Savior and Too late by specifying Shiki's name to avoid confusion of the LLM.

  • Replaced the old image with a better one, expect additional ones.
creator: MrNeutral
